allow: Bash(gtimeout 15 ./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "sys/Yashan!1" -c 1 -debug 2>&1 || echo "Test completed or timed out")
Bash(ssh yashan@10.10.10.130 "echo 'select 1 from dual;' | yasql '/ as sysdba'" 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(ssh yashan@10.10.10.130 "echo 'select 1 from dual;' | yasql 'sys/\\"Yashan!1\\"@10.10.10.130:1688 as sysdba'" 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(ssh yashan@10.10.10.130 'echo "select 1 from dual;" | yasql sys/Yashan\\!1@10.10.10.130:1688' 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(sshpass -p oracle ssh yashan@10.10.10.130 "yasql -S '/ as sysdba' -c \\"DESC V\\\\\\$SESSION\\"")
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 3 -i 2 2>&1 | tail -50)
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 2 -i 2 2>&1 | grep -A 15 "Active Sessions")
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 2 -i 2 2>&1 | grep -A 3 "v\\$SYSSTAT")
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 3 -i 2 2>&1 | head -80)
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 3 -i 2 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 2 -i 2 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(./yastop -ssh-host 10.10.10.130 -ssh-user yashan -ssh-password oracle -connect "/ as sysdba" -c 2 -i 2 2>&1 | grep -A 15 "v\\$SYSSTAT\\|Session Metrics")
Bash(cd internal/scripts && ln -s ../../scripts/sql sql && ln -s ../../scripts/os os)
